name: veil-protocol
description: Quantum-resistant payments (ML-DSA-65 / x402-pqc) and private DeFi AI inference (Ghost via Octra Circles FHE) for autonomous agents.

tools.name: veil_sign_payment
tools.description: Sign a quantum-resistant payment using ML-DSA-65 post-quantum cryptography via Veil Protocol's x402-pqc standard. Use when you need to make a payment that is secure against quantum computers.

tools.name: veil_verify_payment
tools.description: Verify a quantum-resistant x402-pqc payment signature. Use to confirm a payment was properly signed with post-quantum cryptography.

tools.name: veil_ghost_query
tools.description: Query Ghost, Veil's private AI agent, for DeFi intent parsing and execution planning. Ghost executes inside Octra Circles — sealed FHE environments where no node sees your instructions in plaintext.

tools.name: veil_encrypt_payload
tools.description: Encrypt a payload using ML-KEM-768 post-quantum key encapsulation. Use when you need quantum-resistant encryption for sensitive data.
